{{Quote|If you ask me, a musician's goal is to be banned by the Imperial Board of Culture. Take Deeply Religious, for example. Do you think you'd actually know who that band was if it hadn't been for the actions of the IBC? I got a gig coming up where you can make your mark. Head to these coordinates and start offending the Empire, friend.|An event planner to a musician|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Deeply Religious''' was a [[Band/Legends|band]] whose majority of [[Music/Legends|music]] was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]], due to it being loud, fast, and generally having an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] message.

==Discography==
